findings.description: Section s5 has an empty title string "". The source ends with an RST anchor `.. _\`default_value_setting\`:` followed by a horizontal rule separator — a cross-reference target with no heading or body content. The empty title should be set to a descriptive placeholder or the anchor name rather than left as an empty string.
findings.source_evidence: Source ends with: `.. _\`default_value_setting\`:\n\n---------------------------` — RST anchor target only, no heading text

findings.description: Section s5 content is "なし" (3 characters), which is well below the 50-character minimum. The section exists solely to register the `default_value_setting` anchor but carries no substantive content.
findings.source_evidence: Source fragment ends with the bare anchor `.. _\`default_value_setting\`:` — no body content present in this file fragment

findings.description: `listFormat` attribute is used in the s3 JSP example (`listFormat="div"`) but is absent from s3 hints. A user asking about `listFormat` would not find this section.

Several attribute names present in the s4 JSP example are missing from s4 hints: `listFormat`, `optionColumnName`, `labelPattern`, `$VALUE$`, `$NAME$`, `$SHORTNAME$`, `$OPTIONALNAME$`. These are the key configuration attributes used in this section's code example.
findings.source_evidence: Source JSP for s4: `<n:code codeId="0002" pattern="PATTERN2" optionColumnName="OPTION01" labelPattern="$VALUE$:$NAME$-$SHORTNAME$-$OPTIONALNAME$" listFormat="div" />`
